title: The Slug Club
prose: This year's returning Potions Master, Horace Slughorn, has a well-known habit of collecting students he considers promising — well-connected, talented, or simply interesting — into an informal dining circle everyone's taken to calling the Slug Club. Small gilt-edged invitations turn up at breakfast for the chosen few, requesting the pleasure of their company at dinner.

Whether or not one of those invitations finds its way to you says less about your talent than about Slughorn's rather transparent fondness for connections and famous names — Harry Potter, predictably, is a fixture.

choices.label: An invitation finds you, and the dinners turn out to be genuinely interesting, name-dropping aside.
No invitation comes, and you're not entirely sorry to be spared the small talk.
